app.name: forward.dynatrace
app.description: Application dependency and modeled network evidence for Dynatrace and Forward

scopes.name: storage:buckets:read
scopes.comment: Read Grail buckets containing approved dependency evidence

scopes.name: storage:events:read
scopes.comment: Query approved Dynatrace dependency events from Grail

scopes.name: environment-api:entities:read
scopes.comment: Read Dynatrace service/entity context before exporting Forward packages

actions.name: export-forward-package
actions.title: Export Forward intent package
actions.description: Generate checksummed Forward package artifacts from approved Dynatrace dependency evidence. Performs no Forward writes.
